universal_properties.write_granularity: FULL-DOCUMENT REPLACE — every row of every map, every save (ledger_sqlite.py:64-71)
universal_properties.not_validated: model_copy(update=...) bypasses ALL validators on ALL models. Direct setattr bypasses all validators EXCEPT on Moment (the only model with validate_assignment=True, models.py:211).
universal_properties.stale_reads: Ledger.load() outside a transaction is a lock-free snapshot (run.py:274, run.py:441)
universal_properties.silent_corruption: ONE class — a terminal-state write with no public_url saves fine and BRICKS THE NEXT LOAD (invariants.json INV-01)

state.note: CLAIM must precede network. See transitions.json for the full edge list.

public_url.ordering_rule: MUST be set BEFORE the state flip — the four call-site guards depend on it

account_id.conflict_policy: IN-FLIGHT WINS — FINALIZE writes it ONLY when changed (run.py:356), so a concurrent Go-Live remap to a DIFFERENT channel is not churn-clobbered

error_reason.note: CARRIES MACHINE STATE — see couplings.json COUP-03. Three parsers read structure out of it.

metrics / metrics_series.note: metrics_series is APPEND-ONLY, never rewritten (track.py:191); idempotent per cadence offset

scheduled_time.ordering_rule: clear_time MUST un-approve BEFORE clearing, else a queued-and-timeless post exists. Defence-in-depth: a timeless queued post PARKS (run.py:381).

media_url.why: first-writer-wins via the not-set guard — no clobber
media_url.stale_why: nothing invalidates the cache if the hosted URL expires

writer_sites: post/run.py:367 (post-shrink rewrite, guarded on r2.path != render_path)

upsert_last_write_wins: add_imported_media (ledger.py:562 — DELIBERATE: a re-pull's fresher metrics must win)
add_family_idempotency.core_property: every id is content-addressed (ids.py:7), so setdefault makes a whole-pipeline REPLAY a no-op for entity creation
add_family_idempotency.one_deliberate_exception: crosspost._mint_surface_post DELETES and re-mints a post whose prior state is `rejected` or `failed` (crosspost.py:229-231) — so a re-run CAN resurrect a rejected post

accounts.json.pattern: ALL 10 VERIFIED: load INSIDE the lock, mutate the RAW dict (never Account.model_dump()) — preserves siblings + unknown/future fields

validation_gap.write_boundary: SOUND — set_backend strips+lowercases and rejects unknowns (accounts.py:412-415)
validation_gap.validate()_boundary: NONE — checks only the integration/backend PAIRING (accounts.py:241-250), never the VALUE

.env.note: secrets go to the OS KEYRING ONLY, never plaintext .env (MOL-360)

run._publish_throttle_last.hazard: if fanops ever runs as multiple concurrent publisher processes, the Postiz per-minute throttle becomes silently per-process, so N processes publish N× the rate limit. Self-declared in post/CLAUDE.md.

ledger._DEFAULT_LOCK_TIMEOUT.note: read at CALL time, not bound as a default arg (ledger.py:274-275) — tunable without re-import

crash_recovery.note: flock is kernel-released on process death (kill -9 self-heals, ledger.py:265-272); WAL rollback for SQLite

detail: ambiguity park -> needs_reconcile, never failed (postiz.py:424, run.py:325)

worker_races_responder_pool.why: every guard is per-key LOCAL state (rid_before/rid_after, a unique response_path); no shared mutable state (responder.py:99-101, 227-230)

deferred_unlinks.why: cascade .mp4 unlink happens AFTER commit (ledger.py:487-488) — a rolled-back txn never deletes a file it did not drop

cross_surface_A_to_B_exclusion.consequence: couplings.json COUP-01 — PROVEN silent data loss
